annotation_target.structure: Expressive continuation consequent — long melodic line, breathing quality
teaching_goals: long melodic phrases require sustained arm weight
the phrase should feel like a long, slow breath
style_tips: no rushing — this phrase needs time to breathe

teaching_notes.note: A moment of repose within the phrase — let it breathe here.
technique: wrist leads into the phrase arc

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 45–48 of Nocturne in Eb Major, Op. 9 No. 2 (continuation of mm. 41–44), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 45–48 and describe the continuation.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 45–48.
Measures 45–48 extend the phrase with Chopin's characteristic long melodic lines. The melody breathes and the LH supports from below. Let me loop mm. 45–48.
Chopin Nocturne mm. 45–48: long melodic lines, LH support, breathing quality. Pairs with mm. 41–44.
